message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Agreed on deferred tracking for convert-to-next-action">
Agreed — convert Waiting For to Next Action is a separate concern from Step 9. Tracking it as a deferred item in docs/deferred-items.md is the right approach. As long as it's written down, it won't get lost. We can pick it up at the appropriate point in the implementation order.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Thanks Marty. Confirmed -- "Convert Waiting For item to Next Action (US-GTD-5)" is tracked in `docs/deferred-items.md`. Implementation is complete and ready for your review if you'd like to check the scope alignment with the user story.
input.summary: Confirmed deferred item tracked, ready for review
